title: leucanthemum gmelinii
intro: Leucanthemum gmelinii, also known as the Gmelin's daisy or Gmelin's white daisy, is a type of flowering plant in the sunflower family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to soothe and heal wounds. The health benefits of Leucanthemum gmelinii include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. Leucanthemum gmelinii can be prepared as a tea or infusion, and is also used in herbal remedies, such as salves and ointments, to promote healing and skin health.
